testsuite.name: me.owldev.adsignage.domain.video.streaming.VideoStreamingControllerTest

testcase.name: GET is publicly accessible (no JWT required)()
GET with mid-file Range bytes=200-299 returns the matching slice()
GET with Range bytes=0-0 returns the single first byte()
GET without Range header returns 200 with full payload and Accept-Ranges bytes()
GET when on-disk file is missing returns 404 even though row exists()
GET with Range past last byte returns 416()
GET with open-ended Range bytes=N- returns N to EOF()
GET with Range past EOF returns 416 with Content-Range bytes star size()
GET with Range bytes=0-99 returns 206 with the first 100 bytes and proper Content-Range()
GET with malformed Range header falls back to full content (200)()
GET with suffix Range bytes=-50 returns the last 50 bytes()
